home_item1_hoverText: GRG Group Food & Beverage has been supporting brands and project leaders for over 15 years in the development of beverages and dietary supplements.
home_item2_hoverText: We combine scientific expertise and creativity to design unique and reliable products, from formulation to production.
home_item3_hoverText: We support brands and distributors in every key step, with flexibility and rigor, to bring their ideas to market.
home_item4_hoverText: Our priority: quality, safe and compliant products that meet consumer expectations and industry standards.
home_item5_hoverText: We work hand in hand with each client to transform your ideas into concrete, market-ready products.
contact_item1_hoverText: Visit our LinkedIn page to follow our news.
contact_item2_hoverText: Join us on Facebook to discover our latest updates.
contact_item3_hoverText: Follow XPLICITDRINKS to explore our beverages and innovations.
products_item1_hoverText: Premium energy drink, a brand born in Toulouse in 2007. More indulgent recipes, more juice and less sugar.
products_item2_hoverText: Creation of beverage and supplement recipes according to your objectives: energy, wellness, sports, focus or sleep. We provide ingredient mapping, samples, technical sheets and analysis certificates.
products_item3_hoverText: Development of supplements in capsules, pill organizers, powders, shots or gummies. Turnkey solutions, ready for market launch under your brand.
products_item4_hoverText: Flexible European production: aluminum cans, glass or PET bottles, sticks, sachets, pill organizers... High quality standards and quick adaptation to market needs.
products_item5_hoverText: Graphic support and complete packaging: visual design, product branding, labels, POS materials and digital supports. Creative solutions ready for production.
about_item1_hoverText: An agile approach, a reactive structure and accessible production volumes, perfectly adapted to brand launches, limited editions or product line extensions.
about_item2_hoverText: We perform raw material mapping, samples, technical sheets and analysis certificates for each product.
about_item3_hoverText: A catalog of immediately customizable formulas, adapted to your production needs and market requirements.
about_item4_hoverText: Creative solutions for packaging, with the possibility to delegate this phase partially or completely according to your needs.
about_item5_hoverText: GRG Group supports you in all project stages, from idea to market launch, with expertise and flexibility.
services_item1_hoverText: We offer a wide range of formats: cans, glass or PET bottles, shots, pill organizers and much more, to adapt to every type of project.
services_item2_hoverText: Our European industrial network guarantees rapid adaptation capacity to effectively respond to market evolution and specific client needs.
services_item3_hoverText: Our partner sites respect the most demanding quality standards, ensuring safe, traceable products compliant with international regulations.
services_item4_hoverText: Thanks to our industrial network distributed across several European sites, we ensure production continuity and high logistical availability.
services_item5_hoverText: From idea to finished product: Our technical teams support each step of product development, from format selection to production, with a high level of expertise.
